title: STING / Pancreatic Cancer
summary: STING pathway shows preclinical PDAC relevance with early clinical exploration.

claims.text: STING activation is associated with innate immune signaling in pancreatic cancer models.
Trial NCT05234567 evaluates a STING agonist in advanced PDAC.

sections.heading: Mechanism
sections.body: STING activation may enhance innate immune signaling in PDAC.
